title: 10 precautions to take when using Withania somnifera (Ashwagandha) for medicinal purposes
intro: When using Withania somnifera, also known as Ashwagandha, for medicinal purposes, it is important to take certain precautions. First, it is recommended to consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement regimen, including Ashwagandha. This is to ensure that it is safe and appropriate for your individual health situation. Additionally, it is important to follow the recommended dosage on the product label, as taking too much can lead to adverse effects. Furthermore, Ashwagandha may interact with certain medications, such as those that suppress the immune system, sedatives, and thyroid medications, so it is crucial to inform your healthcare provider of any medications you are currently taking. Additionally, Ashwagandha should be avoided by women who are pregnant or breastfeeding, as its safety during these times has not been established.
